violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by kitchen tools. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination (raw chicken over raw beef skewers). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -shelving in kitchen -shelving in walk-in cooler -area between walk-in cooler wall and grease disposal unit New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored above the prep unit. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
